content.title: Crypto Tax Exporter
content.body: Export a complete CSV of all ERC-20 transfers and transactions with USD cost basis for tax reporting — Koinly/CoinTracker compatible.

content.title: ERC-20 Transfer History
content.body: Fetch full ERC-20 transfer history for any wallet, optionally filtered by token contract.

content.title: Historical Portfolio Value
content.body: 30-day rolling historical portfolio value with open/close/high/low per token per day â€” build P&L charts, portfolio performance dashboards, and DeFi fund trackers.

content.title: Historical Token Holdings
content.body: Snapshot of every ERC-20 token balance and USD value at any past date — foundational chains only.

content.title: Multi-Wallet Portfolio Aggregator
content.body: Enter multiple wallet addresses and see combined token balances, total net worth, and unified transaction feed — your whole onchain life in one view.

content.title: Native Token Balance
content.body: Lightweight check for the native token balance (ETH, MATIC, BNB, etc.) of any wallet across any chain.

content.title: Net Worth Calculator
content.body: Calculate total wallet net worth across all EVM and non-EVM chains instantly.

content.title: Portfolio History
content.body: 30-day historical portfolio value over time â€” asset-by-asset breakdown per day.

content.title: Solana Staking Snapshot
content.body: Query a Solana wallet's complete staking picture: native stake accounts (active, activating, deactivating, inactive) pulled from the on-chain stake program, plus liquid staking positions in mSOL (Marinade), jitoSOL (Jito), bSOL (Sanctum), and stSOL (Lido). Returns stake amount in SOL, activation epoch, estimated APY, and claimable rewards for each position — build a staking dashboard, rewards calculator, or unstaking automation agent in one view.

content.title: Solana Transaction History
content.body: Fetch paginated Solana transaction history via `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/` — each transaction is decoded with the top-level program name (Jupiter, Raydium, System, Token, etc.), SOL fee paid, success/fail status, block time, and a human-readable summary. Paginate with `page` and `page-size` params. Build a complete Solana activity feed or trading journal without ever parsing raw instruction data.

content.title: Solana Wallet Age & Activity
content.body: Use `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/transactions_v3/?page-size=1&sort=asc` to find the wallet's first-ever transaction (creation date), then the summary endpoint for total tx count and unique programs interacted with. Returns: first tx date, total lifetime transaction count, top 5 most-called programs, and days since last activity — foundational data for Solana wallet scoring, sybil detection, onchain identity badges, and airdrop eligibility checks.

content.title: Solana Wallet Balances
content.body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/balances_v2/` with your GoldRush API key to retrieve every SPL token held — including name, symbol, logo URI, raw balance, decimals, current USD price, and total USD value per token. Handles associated token accounts (ATAs) automatically with no manual derivation. Add `nft=false` to filter out NFTs and return pure fungible token holdings. Build a full Solana portfolio UI in under 50 lines of TypeScript.

content.title: Transaction History
content.body: Paginated, decoded transaction history with logs for any wallet or contract address.

content.title: Wallet Activity Feed
content.body: Stream live wallet events and transaction activity across any supported chain.

content.title: Wallet Age & Summary
content.body: Get first and last transaction date, total transaction count, and gas spent for any wallet â€” the foundation for wallet age verification and on-chain identity.

content.title: Wallet Balances Skill
content.body: Fetch token balances and portfolio state for any wallet across 100+ chains.

content.title: Wallet P&L Tracker
content.body: Unrealized P&L for every token in a wallet — shows entry price, current price, and total gain/loss per position.

content.title: Base Memecoin Screener
content.body: Live feed of new token launches on Base — subscribes to new Aerodrome/Uniswap pairs, shows real-time price candles and momentum for meme coin hunters.

content.title: DeFi Wallet Dashboard
content.body: Complete DeFi overview for any wallet — current token positions with USD values, 30-day portfolio performance curve, and recent swap activity in one dashboard.

content.title: DEX Trade History
content.body: Pull all DEX swap events and volume for any wallet address or token pair.

content.title: Jupiter Swap Route Finder
content.body: Query Jupiter's on-chain routing data indexed by GoldRush to find the best swap path for any SPL token pair — returns the expected output amount, minimum output after slippage tolerance, price impact percentage, and the full multi-hop route through intermediate DEXes (Raydium, Orca, Meteora, Lifinity, etc.). Feed this into an agent's trade execution loop: if price impact exceeds your threshold, hold the position; otherwise use the route data to construct and submit the swap transaction.

content.title: Live DEX Pair Stream
content.body: Subscribe to new DEX pair creations as they happen across chains — catch launches the moment liquidity is added.

content.title: Raydium Pool Analytics
content.body: Fetch Raydium AMM and CLMM (Concentrated Liquidity) pool data via GoldRush for any pool address or token pair — returns current TVL in USD, 24h trading volume, real-time fee APY, token0/token1 reserve amounts, and current spot price. Use to compare pools before providing liquidity, track impermanent loss on an existing position by comparing entry vs current reserves, or build a Raydium pool leaderboard sorted by fee APY or volume.

content.title: Solana DEX Trade History
content.body: Decode all swap transactions for any Solana wallet via GoldRush's transaction decoder on `solana-mainnet` — automatically identifies and extracts trades from Jupiter, Raydium, Orca, and Meteora instructions. Each decoded trade returns: input token + amount, output token + amount, USD value at trade time, DEX used, and tx signature. Returns a clean trade-by-trade list with zero raw instruction parsing. Build a full Solana trading journal, PnL calculator, or strategy performance analyzer.

content.title: Solana Yield Dashboard
content.body: Aggregate current APY/APR data across the top Solana yield venues using GoldRush: Marinade Finance (native staking 6–7% + liquid mSOL), Orca (CLMM fee APY by pool), Kamino (lending supply/borrow rates), Drift (perpetuals funding rates), and Jito (MEV-boosted staking). Returns a unified yield comparison object sortable by APY, protocol, or risk level — use as the data backbone for an autonomous yield-rebalancing agent or a user-facing 'where should I put my SOL?' comparison UI.

content.title: Token Launch Screener
content.body: Real-time screener for new DEX token launches — filter by minimum liquidity, chain, and pair token. Build a Dexscreener-style new pairs feed.

content.title: Compressed NFT Scanner
content.body: Fetch all cNFTs (Metaplex Bubblegum / Digital Asset Standard) from any Solana wallet using GoldRush's DAS-compatible NFT endpoint — returns asset ID, Merkle tree address, creator, collection address, and full metadata URI for every compressed NFT. Critical for gaming apps (Aurory, Star Atlas items), DePIN reward programs, and loyalty platforms that mint thousands of cNFTs at ~1/1000th the cost of standard NFTs. One call returns the complete cNFT inventory without running a custom DAS indexer.

content.title: Metaplex NFT Portfolio
content.body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/address/{wallet}/nfts/` to return every Metaplex NFT held by a wallet — standard NFTs, pNFTs (programmable NFTs with transfer hooks), and print editions — each with name, image URI, collection address, traits array, and estimated USD floor value derived from recent collection sales. Handles both legacy Token Metadata standard and Token Extensions (Token-2022). Build a complete Solana NFT gallery or valuation dashboard with a single API call.

content.title: Multi-Chain NFT Gallery
content.body: Discover and display every NFT a wallet holds across all chains in one gallery — scan with getAddressActivity then fetch NFTs per active chain.

content.title: NFT Collection Analytics
content.body: Holder count, top holders, transfer velocity, and ownership concentration for any ERC-721 collection — build analytics dashboards without a marketplace API.

content.title: NFT Gallery Viewer
content.body: Drop-in React component that renders a full NFT gallery for any wallet using GoldRush Kit's NFTWalletCollectionView â€” zero custom UI needed.

content.title: NFT Metadata Fetcher
content.body: Retrieve full NFT metadata, traits, and ownership history for any token onchain.

content.title: NFT Portfolio Valuation
content.body: Value an entire NFT portfolio using live collection and market data.

content.title: NFT Token Sale History
content.body: Full transfer and sale history for a single NFT token ID â€” who owned it, when it sold, and for how much. Powers provenance viewers and NFT detail pages.

content.title: NFT Traits Explorer
content.body: Fetch all trait types and their value distributions for an NFT collection. Essential for rarity calculators, collection analytics, and trait-based filtering UIs.

content.title: NFT Transfer Monitor
content.body: Real-time feed of NFT mints, sales, and transfers for any collection — subscribe to ERC-721 Transfer events via the wallet activity stream.

content.title: NFT-Gated App Boilerplate
content.body: Complete Next.js boilerplate with wallet connect, SIWE authentication, and NFT ownership gating — deploy a token-gated product in under an hour.

content.title: Solana NFT Collection Stats
content.body: Fetch aggregated on-chain stats for any Solana NFT collection by collection address — floor price in SOL and USD, 24h trading volume, total unique holder count, total listed supply, and top 5 holder wallets ranked by number of items. Pair with GoldRush's real-time NFT transfer stream to track when floor listings are scooped. Build a collection monitor that fires an alert when floor drops below your target price, volume spikes above 2x average, or holder concentration increases.

content.title: Block Explorer Toolkit
content.body: Fetch block details, all transactions in a block, and decode individual transactions â€” all the building blocks for a custom block explorer.

content.title: Contract Event Dashboard
content.body: Build a real-time event monitor for any smart contract — poll decoded event logs and display a live activity feed for any protocol or token.

content.title: Contract Event Log Monitor
content.body: Stream all decoded event logs emitted by any smart contract â€” filter by topic hash, date, or block range. The foundation for DEX analytics, protocol dashboards, and real-time monitoring.

content.title: Cross-Contract Event Scanner
content.body: Scan ALL contracts on a chain for a specific event by topic hash â€” e.g. find every ERC-20 Transfer or every Uniswap Swap across the entire chain.

content.title: Event Log Decoder
content.body: Decode and search contract event logs across any block range and chain.

content.title: Gas Analytics
content.body: Real-time and historical gas price tracking for any EVM-compatible chain.

content.title: Smart Money Copier
content.body: Track known alpha wallets and surface their new token buys the moment they execute — build a copy trading radar using wallet activity streaming.

content.title: Solana Program Activity Monitor
content.body: Track the on-chain growth of any Solana program — DEX, lending protocol, game, or DePIN — using GoldRush's transaction data on `solana-mainnet`. Fetch daily instruction call count, unique signing wallets per day, week-over-week growth rate, and cumulative user count over any 90-day window. Compare two programs head-to-head on the same metrics. Use for investor due diligence on early-stage protocols, health monitoring dashboards, or surfacing underrated programs with breakout growth before they trend.

content.title: Solana Smart Money Tracker
content.body: Identify high-alpha Solana wallets using GoldRush: fetch recent token buys via transaction history, calculate realized PnL from decoded swap history, and surface wallets with consistently profitable trades (>2x average return over 30 days). Once you have a watchlist, subscribe to their real-time activity stream to receive instant push notifications the moment they buy a new token — before it shows up on Dexscreener. Build a Solana copy-trading radar, alpha group feed, or smart-money signal layer for your trading agent.

content.title: Token OHLCV Chart
content.body: Real-time OHLCV candlestick data for any token — stream live candles via WebSocket for TradingView-style charts.

content.title: Token Price History
content.body: Fetch historical spot prices and OHLCV data for any ERC-20 token onchain.

content.title: Wallet Activity Heatmap
content.body: Generate a GitHub-style activity heatmap showing daily transaction counts for any wallet â€” visualize on-chain behaviour patterns.

content.title: Wallet Comparison Tool
content.body: Compare two wallet addresses side-by-side — token holdings, transaction count, wallet age, and NFT inventory across the same chain.

content.title: Whale Wallet Watchlist
content.body: Monitor a list of whale wallets in real-time — subscribe to live transaction streams for multiple addresses and alert when they move large amounts.

content.title: Agent Counterparty Verification
content.body: Verify counterparty wallets before agent-initiated transactions using risk signals.

content.title: Agent Wallet Skill
content.body: Give AI agents the ability to read wallet state, balances, and transaction data.

content.title: Claude GoldRush Skill
content.body: Claude agent skill for querying GoldRush APIs â€” fetch wallet data, prices, and NFTs.

content.title: GoldRush MCP Server
content.body: Model Context Protocol server exposing GoldRush APIs to LLMs and AI agents.

content.title: Real-time Wallet Stream
content.body: Subscribe to live wallet activity events via WebSocket â€” zero polling, instant updates.

content.title: Solana Agent DeFi Navigator
content.body: Pull real-time Jupiter-aggregated route data and Raydium/Orca pool metrics via GoldRush to give an AI agent the swap intelligence it needs: best output amount, price impact, pool liquidity depth, and fee tier — all in one structured call. Feed this into an agent's decision loop to autonomously execute optimal swaps on Solana — if price impact exceeds threshold, hold; otherwise sign and submit.

content.title: Solana Agent Portfolio Snapshot
content.body: Call GoldRush's `/v1/solana-mainnet/address/{address}/balances_v2/` to load a complete structured payload of every SPL token, native SOL balance, staking positions, and USD net worth into your agent's context. Use this as the mandatory first step before any Solana agent makes a DeFi decision — gives the agent full portfolio awareness in a single API call.

content.title: Solana Agent Risk Gate
content.body: Before any agent-initiated Solana transaction, run the target token's mint address through GoldRush's token risk endpoint: check for active mint authority (creator can inflate supply), freeze authority (creator can lock your tokens), top-3 holder concentration above 50%, and unverified program interactions. Returns a 0–100 risk score plus per-signal breakdown — wire this as a middleware guard in every agent transaction pipeline to block rug pulls before they execute.

content.title: Solana Agent Token Launch Detector
content.body: Stream new SPL token mint events and pump.fun bonding curve graduations in real-time using GoldRush's event monitoring on `solana-mainnet`. When a token graduates (reaches ~$69K market cap and migrates to Raydium), emit a structured event with the mint address, initial Raydium pool address, launch liquidity in SOL, and top-10 early buyers — giving autonomous sniper and launch-monitor agents a clean trigger with full token context to act on immediately.

content.title: Solana Agent Transaction Validator
content.body: Before an agent signs any Solana transaction, call three GoldRush endpoints in parallel: (1) recipient wallet summary — is this a fresh wallet or known flagged address? (2) token risk score — does the token have active mint/freeze authority? (3) agent wallet balance — is there enough SOL for rent + fees? Combine results into a structured go/no-go payload the agent parses before submitting any instruction to the network.

content.title: Solana Agent Wallet Watcher
content.body: Subscribe to any Solana address via GoldRush's wallet activity stream on `solana-mainnet` and receive push events for every SPL token transfer, program invocation, and stake account change — no polling required. Use the event payload (program name, instruction type, token amounts, counterparty address) to trigger downstream agent actions: execute a hedge, send an alert, update agent memory, or rebalance a portfolio the moment a transaction lands.

content.title: All Chains Status Monitor
content.body: Fetch the real-time sync status of all 200+ GoldRush-supported chains â€” latest indexed block, sync lag, and chain metadata. Ideal for multi-chain app health checks.

content.title: Block Date Lookup
content.body: Convert any date range to block numbers on any EVM chain — essential for historical queries and event log scanning.

content.title: Block Explorer Lite
content.body: Full-featured mini block explorer for any EVM chain — search by block, transaction hash, or wallet address, with decoded event logs and internal transfers.

content.title: Gas Price Widget
content.body: Embeddable real-time gas tracker with open/fast/instant tiers and USD fee estimates — drop it into any dApp to show live network conditions.

content.title: GoldRush Kit Approval Manager
content.body: Drop-in React component that shows all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet using ApprovalsListView â€” with built-in revoke functionality.

content.title: GoldRush Kit Token Balances
content.body: Drop-in React component for a full token balances table â€” ERC-20 + native â€” using GoldRush Kit's TokenBalancesListView. Ships with sorting, USD values, logos, and spam filtering.

content.title: GoldRush Kit Transaction Feed
content.body: Drop-in React component rendering a paginated, decoded transaction activity feed for any wallet using WalletActivityListView.

content.title: GoldRush React Hooks
content.body: Drop-in React hooks for balances, NFTs, and token prices â€” onchain data made simple.

content.title: GoldRush TypeScript SDK
content.body: Official TypeScript SDK with full type safety for every GoldRush API endpoint.

content.title: Quickstart Templates
content.body: Starter templates for building onchain apps with Next.js, Vite, and React.

content.title: Solana GoldRush Quickstart
content.body: Scaffold a production-ready Solana wallet dashboard in one command using the GoldRush Next.js starter for Solana — pre-wired with `@covalenthq/client-sdk`, Solana wallet adapter (Phantom/Backpack/Solflare), and four ready-to-run components: SPL token balances table with USD values, decoded transaction history feed with program labels, Metaplex NFT gallery, and a wallet age summary card. Clone, add `GOLDRUSH_API_KEY=your_key` to `.env.local`, run `npm dev`, and ship. No blockchain parsing required.

content.title: Webhook Builder
content.body: Configure real-time webhooks for wallet events, transfers, and contract interactions.

content.title: Cross-Chain Activity Report
content.body: Full cross-chain footprint for any wallet — active chains, combined net worth, unified transaction timeline, and per-chain asset breakdown in one API call.

content.title: Cross-Chain Transaction History
content.body: Fetch and merge transaction history across multiple chains for a single wallet â€” great for multichain explorers, unified activity timelines, and tax reporting tools.

content.title: Multi-Chain Activity Discovery
content.body: Scan every supported chain simultaneously to discover which networks a wallet has been active on â€” single call, 200+ chains. The must-have entry point for any cross-chain app.

content.title: DEX Pool Spot Price
content.body: Fetch real-time spot prices and liquidity for any AMM pool — Uniswap, Aerodrome, PancakeSwap, and more.

content.title: Pump.fun Token Scanner
content.body: Monitor pump.fun's bonding curve program on Solana mainnet via GoldRush event logs — fetch the current market cap in USD, SOL held in the bonding curve, percentage progress toward graduation (~$69K), and the top 10 buyers ranked by SOL spent for any pump.fun token mint address. Subscribe to the graduation event stream to know the exact block when a token migrates to Raydium and acquires its first real liquidity pool — essential for launch-tracker UIs and autonomous sniper agents.

content.title: Solana Token Holders Snapshot
content.body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/token_holders/?page-size=100` to retrieve a ranked list of every wallet holding a given SPL token — returns wallet address, raw balance, USD value, and percentage of total supply for each holder. Paginate through all pages for a complete holder distribution. Use for airdrop snapshot lists, DAO governance voter registries, whale identification, or as input to a holder concentration risk score.

content.title: Solana Token Price History
content.body: Fetch OHLCV daily candlestick data for any SPL token via GoldRush's pricing endpoint — specify the mint address and date range (up to 365 days of history for tokens with sufficient liquidity). Each candle returns open, high, low, close price in USD, and 24h trading volume. Use to render price charts with Recharts or Chart.js, run strategy backtests, calculate unrealized P&L for agent-held positions, or power a token screener with momentum signals.

content.title: Solana Token Whale Alert
content.body: Subscribe to SPL token transfer events for any mint address via GoldRush's real-time activity stream on `solana-mainnet` — filter server-side for transfers above a configurable USD threshold (e.g. >$50K). Each alert payload includes: sender wallet, receiver wallet, token amount, USD value at time of transfer, and the tx signature for on-chain verification. Build a Telegram or Discord whale-alert bot that fires within seconds of a large transfer landing on-chain — under 100 lines of code.

content.title: SPL Token Metadata
content.body: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/` with any SPL token mint address to retrieve: token name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo URI, and current USD price as indexed by GoldRush. Works for any SPL token including newly launched pump.fun tokens, wrapped assets, and DeFi governance tokens. This is the mandatory first call for any Solana token analytics page — gives your app complete token context from a single endpoint.

content.title: Spot Price Ticker
content.body: Live spot prices for thousands of tokens indexed by GoldRush across all chains.

content.title: Token Holders Snapshot
content.body: Paginated list of every holder of an ERC-20 token with balance, percentage of supply, and address. Essential for airdrops, governance snapshots, and holder analytics.

content.title: Token Price History
content.body: Historical USD price for one or more token contracts on any chain. Powers price charts, backtesting, P&L calculation, and DeFi analytics.

content.title: Token Search
content.body: Search any token by name or symbol across all indexed chains — returns address, chain, and logo for instant token lookup UIs.

content.title: Token Supply & Metadata
content.body: Fetch token contract metadata including name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo, and current USD price from a single endpoint.

content.title: Token Transfer Stream
content.body: Real-time stream of ERC-20 transfers for any token or wallet address.

content.title: Token Unlock Tracker
content.body: Monitor Transfer events from known vesting/lock contracts to track token unlocks as they happen — build an unlock calendar or alert system.

content.title: Token Whale Alert
content.body: Detect large ERC-20 transfers for any token in real-time — subscribe to wallet activity and fire alerts when a single transfer exceeds a USD threshold.

content.title: Airdrop Eligibility Checker
content.body: Check whether a wallet meets configurable airdrop criteria — transaction count, wallet age, multi-chain activity, specific protocol interactions, and minimum balance thresholds.

content.title: ENS Resolver
content.body: Resolve ENS names and reverse-lookup wallet addresses to human-readable identities.

content.title: Governance Token Snapshot
content.body: Snapshot all holders of a governance token at a specific block height for voting power calculation, airdrop distribution, or DAO membership verification.

content.title: NFT Gate
content.body: Gate content or app features based on NFT ownership verified through GoldRush.

content.title: Onchain Activity Verifier
content.body: Verify on-chain activity depth with transaction count, wallet age, chains used, and token diversity â€” build KYC-lite gates, Sybil filters, and proof-of-personhood checks.

content.title: Onchain Credit Score Widget
content.body: Embeddable widget that scores any wallet 0–850 based on age, activity depth, asset diversity, and approval hygiene — DeFi's answer to a credit score.

content.title: Onchain Resume
content.body: Generate a shareable public profile page for any wallet — wallet age, chain activity, top assets, NFTs, and DeFi history all in one URL.

content.title: Contract Interaction History
content.body: Full history of contract interactions for security forensics and incident response.

content.title: Smart Contract Interaction Risk
content.body: Score the risk of interacting with any smart contract based on its onchain history and approvals.

content.title: Solana Program Verifier
content.body: Before an agent or user interacts with any unknown Solana program, verify its safety via GoldRush: check if the deployed binary matches a verified source build (OtterSec/Sec3/Otter-verified programs list), look up the program ID against known-malicious contract databases, and fetch its historical instruction volume — high usage over 6+ months signals a battle-tested contract. Returns a `verified` / `unverified` / `malicious` enum plus a link to the audit report if one exists.

content.title: Solana Token Risk Scorer
content.body: For any SPL token mint address, check 4 critical rug-pull signals via GoldRush: (1) mint authority — can the deployer print unlimited new tokens? (2) freeze authority — can they lock tokens in your wallet? (3) top-10 holder concentration — are 10 wallets holding >80% of supply? (4) liquidity lock — is the Raydium LP locked or can it be withdrawn instantly? Returns a 0–100 composite risk score plus the raw value of each signal so you can explain exactly why a token scored high risk. Wire as a pre-trade guard in any agent pipeline or wallet UI.

content.title: Token Approval Risk Scanner
content.body: Scan all active ERC-20 and NFT approvals for a wallet and score each by risk level â€” identify dangerous unlimited approvals, deprecated protocols, and known exploited contracts.

content.title: Token Risk Analyzer
content.body: Score tokens for rug-pull signals, ownership concentration, and LP lock status.

content.title: Transaction Decoded Receipt
content.body: Fetch a fully decoded transaction receipt including internal transfers, decoded log events, ERC-20/NFT movements, and gas analytics â€” the core of any transaction detail page.
